The '''Pelagia Freedom Force''' or '''PFF''' was a small [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] cell that operated in the [[Tapani sector/Legends|Tapani sector]] and was lead by a native of [[Pelagon]], [[Zanthe Nadia]]. The PFF was not based in the [[Pelagia Province]] but on [[Nista]] in the [[Cadriaan Province]] where it had two safehouses. It also had several other branches throughout the sector including safehouses on [[Neona]] and [[Vycinyth]].<ref name="LE" />

The cell had several spies on the resort world of Vycinyth in the [[Barnaba Province]]. Since most of the ruling class of the Tapani sector eventually came to Vycinyth it was an excellent place to acquire information. Nadia also placed a number of agents on the workforce of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Unidentified Torpedo Sphere (Tallaan)|Torpedo Sphere]] in orbit around [[Tallaan]].<ref name="LE" />

Along with its safehouses, the cell also had two [[Shuttle/Legends|shuttles]] and two [[BTL Y-wing starfighter/Legends|Y-wings]].<ref name="LE" />
